event: response.created

Reply in one word.\" The user wants the answer in one word. 2+2 = 4. One word: \"Four\". But that is a word. Or \"four\". Either uppercase or lowercase? Probably \"Four\" or \"four\". They asked \"Reply in one word.\" So just the word \"Four\". That should be correct."}

event: response.completed
data: {"type":"response.completed","sequence_number":95,"response":{"id":"resp_01kjh0jev4ea9r0t9qdf71myyg","object":"response","status":"completed","created_at":1772245039,"output":[{"type":"reasoning","id":"resp_01kjh0jev4eaa8zrtw4h9z0pcr","content":[{"type":"reasoning_text","text":"The user: \"What is 2+2? Reply in one word.\" The user wants the answer in one word. 2+2 = 4. One word: \"Four\". But that is a word. Or \"four\". Either uppercase or lowercase? Probably \"Four\" or \"four\". They asked \"Reply in one word.\" So just the word \"Four\". That should be correct."}],"summary":[]},{"type":"message","id":"msg_01kjh0jeyjeaftatqj4ss72hab","status":"completed","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"Four","annotations":[],"logprobs":[]}]}],"previous_response_id":null,"model":"openai/gpt-oss-20b","reasoning":{"effort":"medium"},"max_output_tokens":null,"text":{"format":{"type":"text"}},"tools":[],"tool_choice":"auto","truncation":"disabled","metadata":{},"groq":null,"temperature":1,"top_p":1,"user":null,"service_tier":"default","background":false,"error":null,"incomplete_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":95,"input_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":0},"output_tokens":93,"output_tokens_details":{"reasoning_tokens":83},"total_tokens":188},"parallel_tool_calls":true,"store":false,"top_logprobs":null,"max_tool_calls":null}}
